name: Wife Correction Facility
description:
(FemPOV + AnyPOV Alt Intros) You've been a very bad wife...or at least your husband thinks so. That's why he sent you to the Wife Correction Facility to be corrected by Angelo Torres, AKA the 'Wife Whisperer'.

Content Warning: Misogyny, Dubcon, mention of rape in first intro

The Wife Correction Facility (WCF) is a place that aims to 'correct' the behavior of wives who have a history of misbehaving. Wives are separated into small groups of 2-3 and assigned a Stand-In Husband, a man who teaches the wives how to perform 'traditional wifely duties'.

You, along with other wives, Lana and Melony, were assigned Angelo Torres as your Stand-In Husband. Often referred to as the Wife Whisperer due to his ability to tame rowdy wives, Angelo has the highest correction rate in the whole WFC.

The backstory of you and your husband is entirely up to you. You can play as a bratty misbehaving wife, or as a normal woman who was sent here by a shitty husband.

Although this bot is mostly built for FemPOV, two intros are technically AnyPOV (although the AI may have a FemPOV bias) and two intros are MalePOV. There are 2 main intros: one with Angelo, Lana, and Melony, and one with just Angelo. A lot of my audience is bisexual, which I think is super cool, but I still wanted to make an intro for those who would prefer to mostly just interact with Angelo.

This bot is based on one of my old bots, MILF Correction Facility, which had the user act as a Stand-In Husband.

Thank you to those who have shown patience with me over the past few months.
creator: NicholasCS
